# Prediction Market Microstructure Analysis

This document analyzes the microstructure of prediction markets on Polymarket,
focusing on the relationship between spread dynamics and market resolution timing.
Evidence suggests that markets with tighter spreads in the final 24 hours before
resolution exhibit higher information efficiency. The analysis covers 500 markets
resolved between January and March 2026. Key finding: average spreads contract by
42% in the final day, with crypto-category markets showing the fastest convergence.
